condition: Cargo dimensions and gross weight known and within EU standard baseline
reason: Vehicle fit can be checked deterministically against baseline, but national rules and actual vehicle configuration still matter.
Vehicle fit cannot be confirmed without length/width/height.
Gross vehicle weight and axle load cannot be checked without cargo weight.

condition: Abnormal permit status unknown for oversized/heavy cargo
reason: Shipment cannot be road-ready until abnormal/special movement permit and route feasibility are confirmed.
Low-loader, tanker, reefer, inloader or specialized carrier availability can block shipment.
